# antd SDK — Complete API Reference

> JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, C#, Kotlin, Swift, Go, Java, Rust, C++, Ruby, PHP, Dart, Lua, Elixir, and Zig SDKs for the Autonomi network via the antd daemon. The daemon manages wallet, payments, and network connectivity. Clients connect over REST (default port 8082) or gRPC (default port 50051). All SDKs support automatic port discovery.

## Port Discovery

All SDKs can automatically discover a running antd daemon. On startup, antd writes a `daemon.port` file containing the REST port (line 1) and gRPC port (line 2) to a platform-specific location:

- **Windows:** `%APPDATA%\ant\daemon.port`
- **Linux:** `$XDG_DATA_HOME/ant/daemon.port` (or `~/.local/share/ant/daemon.port`)
- **macOS:** `~/Library/Application Support/ant/daemon.port`

Every SDK provides auto-discover constructors that read this file and connect automatically, falling back to the default ports if no file is found:

| Language | REST Auto-Discover | gRPC Auto-Discover |
|----------|-------------------|-------------------|
| Python | `RestClient.auto_discover()` | `GrpcClient.auto_discover()` |
| Go | `antd.NewClientAutoDiscover()` | `antd.NewGrpcClientAutoDiscover()` |
| TypeScript | `RestClient.autoDiscover()` | N/A |
| C# | `AntdRestClient.AutoDiscover()` | `AntdGrpcClient.AutoDiscover()` |
| Java | `AntdClient.autoDiscover()` | `GrpcAntdClient.autoDiscover()` |
| Rust | `Client::auto_discover()` | `GrpcClient::auto_discover()` |
| Kotlin | `AntdRestClient.autoDiscover()` | `AntdGrpcClient.autoDiscover()` |
| C++ | `Client::auto_discover()` | `GrpcClient::auto_discover()` |
| Dart | `AntdClient.autoDiscover()` | `GrpcAntdClient.autoDiscover()` |
| Elixir | `Antd.Client.auto_discover()` | `Antd.GrpcClient.auto_discover()` |
| Ruby | `Antd::Client.auto_discover` | `Antd::GrpcClient.auto_discover` |
| Swift | `DaemonDiscovery.autoDiscover()` | `DaemonDiscovery.autoDiscoverGrpc()` |
| PHP | `AntdClient::autoDiscover()` | N/A |
| Lua | `Client.auto_discover()` | N/A |
| Zig | `Client.autoDiscover(allocator)` | N/A |

This is especially useful when antd is spawned with `--rest-port 0` (OS assigns a free port), as in managed mode.

## Quick Start

```python
from antd import AntdClient

client = AntdClient()                          # REST, localhost:8082
client = AntdClient(transport="grpc")          # gRPC, localhost:50051
client = AntdClient(base_url="http://remote:8082")

# Store and retrieve data (payment_mode defaults to "auto")
result = client.data_put_public(b"hello world")
print(result.address, result.cost)
data = client.data_get_public(result.address)  # b"hello world"

# Explicit payment mode for large uploads
result = client.data_put_public(large_data, payment_mode="merkle")
```

```typescript
import { createClient } from "antd";

const client = createClient();                             // REST, localhost:8082
const client = createClient({ baseUrl: "http://remote:8082" });

const result = await client.dataPutPublic(Buffer.from("hello"));
const data = await client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
```

```csharp
using Antd.Sdk;

var client = AntdClientFactory.CreateRest();    // REST, localhost:8082
var client = AntdClientFactory.CreateGrpc();    // gRPC, localhost:50051

var result = await client.DataPutPublicAsync(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes("hello"));
var data = await client.DataGetPublicAsync(result.Address);
```

```kotlin
import com.autonomi.sdk.*
import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking

fun main() = runBlocking {
    val client = AntdClient.createRest()         // REST, localhost:8082
    val client = AntdClient.createGrpc()         // gRPC, localhost:50051

    val result = client.dataPutPublic("hello".toByteArray())
    val data = client.dataGetPublic(result.address)
}
```

```swift
// Swift (macOS only — iOS apps should use the FFI bindings)
import AntdSdk

let client = try AntdClient.createRest()          // REST, localhost:8082
let client = try AntdClient.createGrpc()          // gRPC, localhost:50051

let result = try await client.dataPutPublic("hello".data(using: .utf8)!)
let data = try await client.dataGetPublic(address: result.address)
```

```go
// Go
import antd "github.com/WithAutonomi/ant-sdk/antd-go"

client := antd.NewClient(antd.DefaultBaseURL)       // REST, localhost:8082
ctx := context.Background()

result, _ := client.DataPutPublic(ctx, []byte("hello"))
data, _ := client.DataGetPublic(ctx, result.Address)
```

```java
// Java — Gradle: implementation("com.autonomi:antd-java:0.1.0")
//        Maven: <dependency><groupId>com.autonomi</groupId><artifactId>antd-java</artifactId><version>0.1.0</version></dependency>
import com.autonomi.antd.AntdClient;

try (AntdClient client = AntdClient.create()) {           // REST, localhost:8082
    PutResult result = client.dataPutPublic("hello".getBytes());
    byte[] data = client.dataGetPublic(result.address());
}
```

```rust
// Rust — cargo add antd-client
use antd_client::Client;

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() -> Result<(), antd_client::AntdError> {
    let client = Client::new("http://localhost:8082");     // REST, localhost:8082

    let result = client.data_put_public(b"hello").await?;
    let data = client.data_get_public(&result.address).await?;
    Ok(())
}
```

```cpp
// C++ — CMake FetchContent from GitHub
#include <antd/antd.hpp>

antd::Client client;                                       // REST, localhost:8082
antd::Client client("http://remote:8082");

auto result = client.dataPutPublic("hello");
auto data = client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
```

```ruby
# Ruby — gem install antd
require "antd"

client = Antd::Client.new                            # REST, localhost:8082
client = Antd::Client.new(base_url: "http://remote:8082")

result = client.data_put_public("hello")
data = client.data_get_public(result.address)
```

```php
// PHP — composer require autonomi/antd
<?php
use Autonomi\AntdClient;

$client = AntdClient::create();                      // REST, localhost:8082
$client = AntdClient::create("http://remote:8082");

$result = $client->dataPutPublic("hello");
$data = $client->dataGetPublic($result->address);
```

```dart
// Dart — dart pub add antd
import 'package:antd/antd.dart';

final client = AntdClient();                         // REST, localhost:8082
final client = AntdClient(baseUrl: 'http://remote:8082');

final result = await client.dataPutPublic('hello'.codeUnits);
final data = await client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
```

```lua
-- Lua — luarocks install antd
local antd = require("antd")

local client = antd.Client.new()                     -- REST, localhost:8082
local client = antd.Client.new({base_url = "http://remote:8082"})

local result = client:data_put_public("hello")
local data = client:data_get_public(result.address)
```

```elixir
# Elixir — {:antd, "~> 0.1"} in mix.exs deps
client = Antd.Client.new()                           # REST, localhost:8082
client = Antd.Client.new(base_url: "http://remote:8082")

{:ok, result} = Antd.Client.data_put_public(client, "hello")
{:ok, data} = Antd.Client.data_get_public(client, result.address)
```

```zig
// Zig — add dependency in build.zig.zon
const antd = @import("antd");

var client = try antd.Client.init(.{});              // REST, localhost:8082
defer client.deinit();

const result = try client.dataPutPublic("hello");
const data = try client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
```

---

## REST API — All Endpoints

### Health

#### `GET /health`
Returns daemon health and network name.

Response: `{"status": "ok", "network": "local"}`

### Data

#### `POST /v1/data/public`
Store public (unencrypted) data on the network.

Request: `{"data": "<base64>", "payment_mode": "auto"}` (payment_mode is optional, defaults to "auto")
Response: `{"address": "<hex>", "chunks_stored": <uint>, "payment_mode_used": "auto|merkle|single"}`

#### `GET /v1/data/public/{addr}`
Retrieve public data by hex address.

Response: `{"data": "<base64>"}`

#### `GET /v1/data/public/{addr}/stream`
Stream public data as chunked response. Same path params as above.

#### `POST /v1/data/private`
Store private (encrypted) data. Returns a data map instead of address.

Request: `{"data": "<base64>", "payment_mode": "auto"}` (payment_mode is optional, defaults to "auto")
Response: `{"data_map": "<hex>", "chunks_stored": <uint>, "payment_mode_used": "auto|merkle|single"}`

#### `GET /v1/data/private`
Retrieve private data using data map.

Query params: `data_map=<hex>`
Response: `{"data": "<base64>"}`

#### `POST /v1/data/cost`
Estimate cost to store data. Samples up to 5 chunk addresses for the on-chain
quote, then extrapolates — much faster than quoting every chunk.

Request: `{"data": "<base64>"}`
Response: `{"cost": "<atto_tokens>", "file_size": <uint>, "chunk_count": <uint>, "estimated_gas_cost_wei": "<wei>", "payment_mode": "auto|merkle|single"}`

### Chunks

#### `POST /v1/chunks`
Store a raw chunk.

Request: `{"data": "<base64>"}`
Response: `{"cost": "<atto_tokens>", "address": "<hex>"}`

#### `GET /v1/chunks/{addr}`
Retrieve a raw chunk by hex address.

Response: `{"data": "<base64>"}`

### Files

Upload and download files/directories from the local filesystem.

#### `POST /v1/files/upload/public`
Upload a local file.

Request: `{"path": "/absolute/path/to/file", "payment_mode": "auto"}` (payment_mode is optional, defaults to "auto")
Response: `{"address": "<hex>", "storage_cost_atto": "<atto>", "gas_cost_wei": "<wei>", "chunks_stored": <uint>, "payment_mode_used": "auto|merkle|single"}`

#### `POST /v1/files/download/public`
Download a file to a local path.

Request: `{"address": "<hex>", "dest_path": "/absolute/path"}`

#### `POST /v1/files`
Upload a local file *privately*. Returns a caller-held DataMap; the DataMap is NOT stored on-network.

Request: `{"path": "/absolute/path/to/file", "payment_mode": "auto"}` (payment_mode is optional, defaults to "auto")
Response: `{"data_map": "<hex>", "storage_cost_atto": "<atto>", "gas_cost_wei": "<wei>", "chunks_stored": <uint>, "payment_mode_used": "auto|merkle|single"}`

#### `POST /v1/files/get`
Download a private file from a caller-held DataMap into a local path.

Request: `{"data_map": "<hex>", "dest_path": "/absolute/path"}`

#### `POST /v1/files/cost`
Estimate file upload cost. Samples up to 5 chunk addresses for the on-chain
quote, then extrapolates — much faster than quoting every chunk.

Request: `{"path": "/path/to/file", "is_public": true}` (`is_public` optional, defaults to true)
Response: `{"cost": "<atto_tokens>", "file_size": <uint>, "chunk_count": <uint>, "estimated_gas_cost_wei": "<wei>", "payment_mode": "auto|merkle|single"}`

#### `GET /v1/wallet/address`
Get the wallet's public address.

Response: `{"address": "0x..."}`
Returns 400 if no wallet is configured.

#### `GET /v1/wallet/balance`
Get the wallet's token and gas balances.

Response: `{"balance": "<atto_tokens>", "gas_balance": "<atto_tokens>"}`
Returns 400 if no wallet is configured.

#### `POST /v1/wallet/approve`
Approve the wallet to spend tokens on payment contracts (one-time operation before any storage).

Request: `{}` (empty body)
Response: `{"approved": true}`
Returns 400 if no wallet is configured.

#### `POST /v1/data/prepare`
Prepare a data upload for external signing (two-phase upload). Instead of antd paying
from its built-in wallet, this returns payment details for an external signer.

Request: `{"data": "base64-encoded-bytes"}`

The response includes a `payment_type` discriminator that determines the payment flow:

**Wave-batch response** (< 64 chunks — call `payForQuotes()`, finalize with `tx_hashes`):
```json
{
  "upload_id": "hex-string",
  "payment_type": "wave_batch",
  "payments": [
    { "quote_hash": "0x...", "rewards_address": "0x...", "amount": "123" }
  ],
  "total_amount": "456",
  "payment_vault_address": "0x...",
  "payment_token_address": "0x...",
  "rpc_url": "http://...",
  "total_chunks": 3,
  "already_stored_count": 1
}
```

`total_chunks` and `already_stored_count` were added in antd 0.10.0 (older daemons omit them; SDKs default both to 0). They report the already-stored preflight: the signer pays for `total_chunks - already_stored_count` chunks, so a prepare can legitimately come back cheaper than the raw file size implies.

**Merkle response** (>= 64 chunks — call `payForMerkleTree()`, finalize with `winner_pool_hash`):
```json
{
  "upload_id": "hex-string",
  "payment_type": "merkle",
  "depth": 5,
  "pool_commitments": [
    {
      "pool_hash": "0x...",
      "candidates": [
        { "rewards_address": "0x...", "amount": "1000" }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "merkle_payment_timestamp": 1712150400,
  "payment_vault_address": "0x...",
  "total_amount": "0",
  "payment_token_address": "0x...",
  "rpc_url": "http://...",
  "total_chunks": 128,
  "already_stored_count": 4
}
```

#### `POST /v1/upload/prepare`
Prepare a file upload for external signing. Same response format as `/v1/data/prepare`.

Request: `{"path": "/path/to/file"}`

#### `POST /v1/upload/finalize`
Finalize an upload after an external signer has submitted payment on-chain.
Provide either `tx_hashes` (wave_batch) or `winner_pool_hash` (merkle).

Wave-batch request: `{"upload_id": "hex", "tx_hashes": {"0xquotehash": "0xtxhash", ...}}`
Merkle request: `{"upload_id": "hex", "winner_pool_hash": "0x..."}`
Response: `{"data_map": "hex", "address": "hex", "chunks_stored": 5}`

#### `POST /v1/chunks/prepare`
Prepare a single-chunk upload for external signing. The bytes are stored
verbatim as one chunk at their BLAKE3 address — no self-encryption. Unlike
`POST /v1/chunks`, this handler does NOT require the daemon to have a wallet;
all funds flow through the external signer.

Request: `{"data": "<base64>"}`

When the chunk is already on-network (no payment needed, no finalize call):
```json
{ "address": "<hex>", "already_stored": true }
```

When payment is needed (wave_batch shape — `payForQuotes()` then call `/v1/chunks/finalize` with the resulting `tx_hashes`):
```json
{
  "address": "<hex>",
  "already_stored": false,
  "upload_id": "<hex>",
  "payment_type": "wave_batch",
  "payments": [
    { "quote_hash": "0x...", "rewards_address": "0x...", "amount": "123" }
  ],
  "total_amount": "456",
  "payment_vault_address": "0x...",
  "payment_token_address": "0x...",
  "rpc_url": "http://..."
}
```

#### `POST /v1/chunks/finalize`
Finalize a single-chunk upload after the external signer has paid the quotes
returned by `/v1/chunks/prepare`.

Request: `{"upload_id": "<hex>", "tx_hashes": {"0xquotehash": "0xtxhash", ...}}`
Response: `{"address": "<hex>"}`

---

## gRPC API — All Services

Default target: `localhost:50051`. Package: `antd.v1`.

### HealthService (health.proto)
- `Check(HealthCheckRequest) → HealthCheckResponse` — returns status and network name

### DataService (data.proto)
- `GetPublic(GetPublicDataRequest{address}) → GetPublicDataResponse{data: bytes}`
- `PutPublic(PutPublicDataRequest{data: bytes}) → PutPublicDataResponse{cost, address}`
- `StreamPublic(StreamPublicDataRequest{address}) → stream DataChunk{data: bytes}`
- `GetPrivate(GetPrivateDataRequest{data_map}) → GetPrivateDataResponse{data: bytes}`
- `PutPrivate(PutPrivateDataRequest{data: bytes}) → PutPrivateDataResponse{cost, data_map}`
- `GetCost(DataCostRequest{data: bytes}) → Cost{atto_tokens, file_size, chunk_count, estimated_gas_cost_wei, payment_mode}`

### ChunkService (chunks.proto)
- `Get(GetChunkRequest{address}) → GetChunkResponse{data: bytes}`
- `Put(PutChunkRequest{data: bytes}) → PutChunkResponse{cost, address}`

### FileService (files.proto)
- `UploadPublic(UploadFileRequest{path}) → UploadPublicResponse{cost, address}`
- `DownloadPublic(DownloadPublicRequest{address, dest_path}) → DownloadResponse{}`
- `GetFileCost(FileCostRequest{path, is_public}) → Cost{atto_tokens, file_size, chunk_count, estimated_gas_cost_wei, payment_mode}`

### EventService (events.proto)
- `Subscribe(SubscribeRequest{}) → stream ClientEventProto{kind, records_paid, records_already_paid, tokens_spent}`

### SDKs with gRPC support
Go, Python, C#, Kotlin, Swift, Rust, Java, C++, Dart, Ruby, Elixir (11 of 15 SDKs).
JS/TS, PHP, Lua, and Zig are REST-only.

---

## Model Types

### Common (both SDKs)

| Type | Fields | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| HealthStatus | ok: bool, network: string | Health check result |
| PutResult | cost: string, address: string | Result from any create/put operation |
| UploadCostEstimate | cost: string, file_size: u64, chunk_count: u32, estimated_gas_cost_wei: string, payment_mode: string | Pre-upload cost breakdown returned by data_cost / file_cost. Server samples up to 5 chunk addresses and extrapolates; gas is an advisory heuristic. |

---

## Payment Modes

All data and file upload operations accept an optional `payment_mode` parameter that controls how storage payments are batched:

| Mode | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| `"auto"` (default) | Uses merkle batch payments for uploads of 64+ chunks, single payments otherwise. Best for general use. |
| `"merkle"` | Forces merkle batch payments regardless of chunk count (minimum 2 chunks). Saves gas on larger uploads. |
| `"single"` | Forces per-chunk payments. Useful for small data or debugging. |

This applies to all PUT endpoints (`data_put_public`, `data_put_private`, `file_upload_public`) across all SDKs. The parameter is always optional and defaults to `"auto"`.

**REST:** Include `"payment_mode": "merkle"` in the JSON request body.

**SDK examples:**
```python
# Python
result = client.data_put_public(data, payment_mode="merkle")
```
```go
// Go
result, err := client.DataPutPublic(ctx, data, antd.WithPaymentMode("merkle"))
```
```typescript
// TypeScript
const result = await client.dataPutPublic(data, { paymentMode: "merkle" });
```

---

## JS/TS SDK Method Signatures

```typescript
import { createClient } from "antd";

const client = createClient();                                  // REST, localhost:8082
const client = createClient({ baseUrl: "http://remote:8082" }); // custom URL
const client = createClient({ timeout: 60_000 });               // custom timeout (ms)

// Health
client.health(): Promise<HealthStatus>

// Data
client.dataPutPublic(data: Buffer, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<DataPutPublicResult>
client.dataGetPublic(address: string): Promise<Buffer>
client.dataPut(data: Buffer, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<DataPutResult>
client.dataGet(dataMap: string): Promise<Buffer>
client.dataCost(data: Buffer, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<UploadCostEstimate>

// Chunks
client.chunkPut(data: Buffer): Promise<PutResult>
client.chunkGet(address: string): Promise<Buffer>

// Files
client.filePut(path: string, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<FilePutResult>
client.fileGet(dataMap: string, destPath: string): Promise<void>
client.filePutPublic(path: string, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<FilePutPublicResult>
client.fileGetPublic(address: string, destPath: string): Promise<void>
client.fileCost(path: string, isPublic?: boolean, opts?: { paymentMode?: PaymentMode }): Promise<UploadCostEstimate>

// Wallet
client.walletAddress(): Promise<WalletAddress>
client.walletBalance(): Promise<WalletBalance>
client.walletApprove(): Promise<boolean>
```

---

## Python SDK Method Signatures

```python
from antd import AntdClient, AsyncAntdClient

client = AntdClient(transport="rest", base_url="http://localhost:8082")
client = AntdClient(transport="grpc", target="localhost:50051")

# Health
client.health() → HealthStatus

# Data
client.data_put_public(data: bytes, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → DataPutPublicResult
client.data_get_public(address: str) → bytes
client.data_put(data: bytes, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → DataPutResult
client.data_get(data_map: str) → bytes
client.data_cost(data: bytes, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → UploadCostEstimate

# Chunks
client.chunk_put(data: bytes) → PutResult
client.chunk_get(address: str) → bytes

# Files
client.file_put(path: str, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → FilePutResult
client.file_get(data_map: str, dest_path: str) → None
client.file_put_public(path: str, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → FilePutPublicResult
client.file_get_public(address: str, dest_path: str) → None
client.file_cost(path: str, is_public: bool = True, payment_mode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.AUTO) → UploadCostEstimate

# Wallet
client.wallet_address() → WalletAddress
client.wallet_balance() → WalletBalance
client.wallet_approve() → bool
```

---

## C# SDK Method Signatures

```csharp
using Antd.Sdk;

IAntdClient client = AntdClientFactory.CreateRest();   // localhost:8082
IAntdClient client = AntdClientFactory.CreateGrpc();   // localhost:50051

// Health
Task<HealthStatus> HealthAsync();

// Data
Task<DataPutPublicResult> DataPutPublicAsync(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);
Task<byte[]> DataGetPublicAsync(string address);
Task<DataPutResult> DataPutAsync(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);
Task<byte[]> DataGetAsync(string dataMap);
Task<UploadCostEstimate> DataCostAsync(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);

// Chunks
Task<PutResult> ChunkPutAsync(byte[] data);
Task<byte[]> ChunkGetAsync(string address);

// Files
Task<FilePutResult> FilePutAsync(string path, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);
Task FileGetAsync(string dataMap, string destPath);
Task<FilePutPublicResult> FilePutPublicAsync(string path, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);
Task FileGetPublicAsync(string address, string destPath);
Task<UploadCostEstimate> FileCostAsync(string path, bool isPublic = true, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto);

// Wallet
Task<WalletAddress> WalletAddressAsync();
Task<WalletBalance> WalletBalanceAsync();
Task<bool> WalletApproveAsync();
```

---

## Kotlin SDK Method Signatures

```kotlin
import com.autonomi.sdk.*

val client = AntdClient.createRest()          // localhost:8082
val client = AntdClient.createGrpc()          // localhost:50051

// Health
suspend fun health(): HealthStatus

// Data
suspend fun dataPutPublic(data: ByteArray, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): DataPutPublicResult
suspend fun dataGetPublic(address: String): ByteArray
suspend fun dataPut(data: ByteArray, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): DataPutResult
suspend fun dataGet(dataMap: String): ByteArray
suspend fun dataCost(data: ByteArray, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): UploadCostEstimate

// Chunks
suspend fun chunkPut(data: ByteArray): PutResult
suspend fun chunkGet(address: String): ByteArray

// Files
suspend fun filePut(path: String, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): FilePutResult
suspend fun fileGet(dataMap: String, destPath: String)
suspend fun filePutPublic(path: String, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): FilePutPublicResult
suspend fun fileGetPublic(address: String, destPath: String)
suspend fun fileCost(path: String, isPublic: Boolean = true, paymentMode: PaymentMode = PaymentMode.Auto): UploadCostEstimate

// Wallet
suspend fun walletAddress(): WalletAddress
suspend fun walletBalance(): WalletBalance
suspend fun walletApprove(): Boolean
```

---

## Swift SDK Method Signatures

> REST/gRPC transport requires macOS. For iOS, use the FFI bindings.

```swift
import AntdSdk

let client = try AntdClient.createRest()          // localhost:8082
let client = try AntdClient.createGrpc()          // localhost:50051

// Health
func health() async throws -> HealthStatus

// Data
func dataPutPublic(_ data: Data, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> DataPutPublicResult
func dataGetPublic(address: String) async throws -> Data
func dataPut(_ data: Data, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> DataPutResult
func dataGet(dataMap: String) async throws -> Data
func dataCost(_ data: Data, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> UploadCostEstimate

// Chunks
func chunkPut(_ data: Data) async throws -> PutResult
func chunkGet(address: String) async throws -> Data

// Files
func filePut(path: String, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> FilePutResult
func fileGet(dataMap: String, destPath: String) async throws
func filePutPublic(path: String, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> FilePutPublicResult
func fileGetPublic(address: String, destPath: String) async throws
func fileCost(path: String, isPublic: Bool, paymentMode: PaymentMode = .auto) async throws -> UploadCostEstimate

// Wallet
func walletAddress() async throws -> WalletAddress
func walletBalance() async throws -> WalletBalance
func walletApprove() async throws -> Bool
```

---

## Go SDK Method Signatures

```go
import antd "github.com/WithAutonomi/ant-sdk/antd-go"

client := antd.NewClient(antd.DefaultBaseURL)        // localhost:8082

// Health
func (c *Client) Health(ctx context.Context) (*HealthStatus, error)

// Data
func (c *Client) DataPutPublic(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*DataPutPublicResult, error)
func (c *Client) DataGetPublic(ctx context.Context, address string) ([]byte, error)
func (c *Client) DataPut(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*DataPutResult, error)
func (c *Client) DataGet(ctx context.Context, dataMap string) ([]byte, error)
func (c *Client) DataCost(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*UploadCostEstimate, error)

// Data — private = unqualified verb, public = _public suffix.
func (c *Client) DataPut(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*DataPutResult, error)
func (c *Client) DataGet(ctx context.Context, dataMap string) ([]byte, error)
func (c *Client) DataPutPublic(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*DataPutPublicResult, error)
func (c *Client) DataGetPublic(ctx context.Context, address string) ([]byte, error)
func (c *Client) DataCost(ctx context.Context, data []byte, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*UploadCostEstimate, error)

// Chunks (no payment_mode — single-chunk primitive, no batch to optimize)
func (c *Client) ChunkPut(ctx context.Context, data []byte) (*PutResult, error)
func (c *Client) ChunkGet(ctx context.Context, address string) ([]byte, error)

// Files
func (c *Client) FilePut(ctx context.Context, path string, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*FilePutResult, error)
func (c *Client) FileGet(ctx context.Context, dataMap string, destPath string) error
func (c *Client) FilePutPublic(ctx context.Context, path string, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*FilePutPublicResult, error)
func (c *Client) FileGetPublic(ctx context.Context, address string, destPath string) error
func (c *Client) FileCost(ctx context.Context, path string, isPublic bool, paymentMode PaymentMode) (*UploadCostEstimate, error)

// Wallet
func (c *Client) WalletAddress(ctx context.Context) (*WalletAddress, error)
func (c *Client) WalletBalance(ctx context.Context) (*WalletBalance, error)
func (c *Client) WalletApprove(ctx context.Context) error
```

---

## Java SDK Method Signatures

```java
// Gradle: implementation("com.autonomi:antd-java:0.1.0")
// Maven:  <dependency><groupId>com.autonomi</groupId><artifactId>antd-java</artifactId><version>0.1.0</version></dependency>
import com.autonomi.antd.AntdClient;

AntdClient client = AntdClient.create();                  // REST, localhost:8082
AntdClient client = AntdClient.create("http://remote:8082");

// Health
HealthStatus health() throws AntdException

// Data
DataPutPublicResult dataPutPublic(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException
byte[] dataGetPublic(String address) throws AntdException
DataPutResult dataPut(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException
byte[] dataGet(String dataMap) throws AntdException
UploadCostEstimate dataCost(byte[] data, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException

// Chunks
PutResult chunkPut(byte[] data) throws AntdException
byte[] chunkGet(String address) throws AntdException

// Files
FilePutResult filePut(String path, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException
void fileGet(String dataMap, String destPath) throws AntdException
FilePutPublicResult filePutPublic(String path, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException
void fileGetPublic(String address, String destPath) throws AntdException
UploadCostEstimate fileCost(String path, boolean isPublic, PaymentMode paymentMode) throws AntdException

// Wallet
WalletAddress walletAddress() throws AntdException
WalletBalance walletBalance() throws AntdException
boolean walletApprove() throws AntdException

// AntdClient implements AutoCloseable — use try-with-resources
```

---

## Rust SDK Method Signatures

```rust
// cargo add antd-client
use antd_client::{Client, PutResult, HealthStatus, AntdError};

let client = Client::new("http://localhost:8082");        // REST, localhost:8082

// Health
async fn health(&self) -> Result<HealthStatus, AntdError>

// Data
async fn data_put_public(&self, data: &[u8], payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<DataPutPublicResult, AntdError>
async fn data_get_public(&self, address: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, AntdError>
async fn data_put(&self, data: &[u8], payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<DataPutResult, AntdError>
async fn data_get(&self, data_map: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, AntdError>
async fn data_cost(&self, data: &[u8], payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<UploadCostEstimate, AntdError>

// Chunks
async fn chunk_put(&self, data: &[u8]) -> Result<PutResult, AntdError>
async fn chunk_get(&self, address: &str) -> Result<Vec<u8>, AntdError>

// Files
async fn file_put(&self, path: &str, payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<FilePutResult, AntdError>
async fn file_get(&self, data_map: &str, dest_path: &str) -> Result<(), AntdError>
async fn file_put_public(&self, path: &str, payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<FilePutPublicResult, AntdError>
async fn file_get_public(&self, address: &str, dest_path: &str) -> Result<(), AntdError>
async fn file_cost(&self, path: &str, is_public: bool, payment_mode: PaymentMode) -> Result<UploadCostEstimate, AntdError>

// Wallet
async fn wallet_address(&self) -> Result<WalletAddress, AntdError>
async fn wallet_balance(&self) -> Result<WalletBalance, AntdError>
async fn wallet_approve(&self) -> Result<bool, AntdError>

// AntdError variants: BadRequest, Payment, NotFound, AlreadyExists, Fork, TooLarge, Internal, Network
```

---

## C++ SDK Method Signatures

```cpp
// CMake FetchContent from GitHub
#include <antd/antd.hpp>

antd::Client client;                                      // REST, localhost:8082
antd::Client client("http://remote:8082");

// Health
antd::HealthStatus health()                               // throws antd::AntdError

// Data
antd::DataPutPublicResult dataPutPublic(const std::vector<uint8_t>& data, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)
std::vector<uint8_t> dataGetPublic(const std::string& address)
antd::DataPutResult dataPut(const std::vector<uint8_t>& data, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)
std::vector<uint8_t> dataGet(const std::string& dataMap)
UploadCostEstimate dataCost(const std::vector<uint8_t>& data, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)

// Chunks
antd::PutResult chunkPut(const std::vector<uint8_t>& data)
std::vector<uint8_t> chunkGet(const std::string& address)

// Files
antd::FilePutResult filePut(const std::string& path, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)
void fileGet(const std::string& dataMap, const std::string& destPath)
antd::FilePutPublicResult filePutPublic(const std::string& path, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)
void fileGetPublic(const std::string& address, const std::string& destPath)
UploadCostEstimate fileCost(const std::string& path, bool isPublic = true, antd::PaymentMode paymentMode = antd::PaymentMode::Auto)

// Wallet
antd::WalletAddress walletAddress()
antd::WalletBalance walletBalance()
bool walletApprove()

// All methods throw antd::AntdError or subclasses: BadRequestError, PaymentError, NotFoundError,
// AlreadyExistsError, ForkError, TooLargeError, InternalError, NetworkError
```

---

## Ruby SDK Method Signatures

```ruby
require "antd"

client = Antd::Client.new                            # localhost:8082
client = Antd::Client.new(base_url: "http://remote:8082")

# Health
client.health → HealthStatus

# Data
client.data_put_public(data, payment_mode: :auto) → DataPutPublicResult
client.data_get_public(address) → String
client.data_put(data, payment_mode: :auto) → DataPutResult
client.data_get(data_map) → String
client.data_cost(data, payment_mode: :auto) → UploadCostEstimate

# Chunks
client.chunk_put(data) → PutResult
client.chunk_get(address) → String

# Files
client.file_put(path, payment_mode: :auto) → FilePutResult
client.file_get(data_map, dest_path) → nil
client.file_put_public(path, payment_mode: :auto) → FilePutPublicResult
client.file_get_public(address, dest_path) → nil
client.file_cost(path, is_public: true, payment_mode: :auto) → UploadCostEstimate

# Wallet
client.wallet_address → WalletAddress
client.wallet_balance → WalletBalance
client.wallet_approve → Boolean
```

---

## PHP SDK Method Signatures

```php
use Autonomi\AntdClient;

$client = AntdClient::create();                      // localhost:8082
$client = AntdClient::create("http://remote:8082");

// Health
$client->health(): HealthStatus

// Data
$client->dataPutPublic(string $data, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): DataPutPublicResult
$client->dataGetPublic(string $address): string
$client->dataPut(string $data, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): DataPutResult
$client->dataGet(string $dataMap): string
$client->dataCost(string $data, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): UploadCostEstimate

// Chunks
$client->chunkPut(string $data): PutResult
$client->chunkGet(string $address): string

// Files
$client->filePut(string $path, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): FilePutResult
$client->fileGet(string $dataMap, string $destPath): void
$client->filePutPublic(string $path, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): FilePutPublicResult
$client->fileGetPublic(string $address, string $destPath): void
$client->fileCost(string $path, bool $isPublic = true, string $paymentMode = 'auto'): UploadCostEstimate

// Wallet
$client->walletAddress(): array{address: string}
$client->walletBalance(): array{balance: string, gas_balance: string}
$client->walletApprove(): bool
```

---

## Dart SDK Method Signatures

```dart
import 'package:antd/antd.dart';

final client = AntdClient();                         // localhost:8082
final client = AntdClient(baseUrl: 'http://remote:8082');

// Health
Future<HealthStatus> health()

// Data
Future<DataPutPublicResult> dataPutPublic(List<int> data, {PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})
Future<List<int>> dataGetPublic(String address)
Future<DataPutResult> dataPut(List<int> data, {PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})
Future<List<int>> dataGet(String dataMap)
Future<UploadCostEstimate> dataCost(List<int> data, {PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})

// Chunks
Future<PutResult> chunkPut(List<int> data)
Future<List<int>> chunkGet(String address)

// Files
Future<FilePutResult> filePut(String path, {PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})
Future<void> fileGet(String dataMap, String destPath)
Future<FilePutPublicResult> filePutPublic(String path, {PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})
Future<void> fileGetPublic(String address, String destPath)
Future<UploadCostEstimate> fileCost(String path, {bool isPublic = true, PaymentMode paymentMode = PaymentMode.auto})

// Wallet
Future<WalletAddress> walletAddress()
Future<WalletBalance> walletBalance()
Future<bool> walletApprove()
```

---

## Lua SDK Method Signatures

```lua
local antd = require("antd")

local client = antd.Client.new()                     -- localhost:8082
local client = antd.Client.new({base_url = "http://remote:8082"})

-- Health
client:health() → HealthStatus

-- Data
client:data_put_public(data, payment_mode) → DataPutPublicResult (table)
client:data_get_public(address) → string
client:data_put(data, payment_mode) → DataPutResult (table)
client:data_get(data_map) → string
client:data_cost(data, payment_mode) → UploadCostEstimate (table)

-- Chunks
client:chunk_put(data) → PutResult
client:chunk_get(address) → string

-- Files
client:file_put(path, payment_mode) → FilePutResult (table)
client:file_get(data_map, dest_path) → nil
client:file_put_public(path, payment_mode) → FilePutPublicResult (table)
client:file_get_public(address, dest_path) → nil
client:file_cost(path, is_public, payment_mode) → UploadCostEstimate (table)

-- Wallet
client:wallet_address() → {address=string}
client:wallet_balance() → {balance=string, gas_balance=string}
client:wallet_approve() → boolean
```

---

## Elixir SDK Method Signatures

```elixir
client = Antd.Client.new()                           # localhost:8082
client = Antd.Client.new(base_url: "http://remote:8082")

# Health
Antd.Client.health(client) :: {:ok, HealthStatus.t()} | {:error, term()}

# Data
Antd.Client.data_put_public(client, data, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, DataPutPublicResult.t()} | {:error, term()}  # opts: [payment_mode: :auto | :merkle | :single]
Antd.Client.data_get_public(client, address) :: {:ok, binary()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.data_put(client, data, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, DataPutResult.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.data_get(client, data_map) :: {:ok, binary()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.data_cost(client, data, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, Antd.UploadCostEstimate.t()} | {:error, term()}

# Chunks
Antd.Client.chunk_put(client, data) :: {:ok, PutResult.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.chunk_get(client, address) :: {:ok, binary()} | {:error, term()}

# Files
Antd.Client.file_put(client, path, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, FilePutResult.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.file_get(client, data_map, dest_path) :: :ok | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.file_put_public(client, path, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, FilePutPublicResult.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.file_get_public(client, address, dest_path) :: :ok | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.file_cost(client, path, is_public \\ true, opts \\ []) :: {:ok, Antd.UploadCostEstimate.t()} | {:error, term()}

# Wallet
Antd.Client.wallet_address(client) :: {:ok, WalletAddress.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.wallet_balance(client) :: {:ok, WalletBalance.t()} | {:error, term()}
Antd.Client.wallet_approve(client) :: {:ok, boolean()} | {:error, term()}
```

---

## Zig SDK Method Signatures

```zig
const antd = @import("antd");

var client = try antd.Client.init(.{});              // localhost:8082
var client = try antd.Client.init(.{ .base_url = "http://remote:8082" });
defer client.deinit();

// Health
fn health(self: *Client) !HealthStatus

// Data
fn dataPutPublic(self: *Client, data: []const u8, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !DataPutPublicResult
fn dataGetPublic(self: *Client, address: []const u8) ![]u8
fn dataPut(self: *Client, data: []const u8, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !DataPutResult
fn dataGet(self: *Client, data_map: []const u8) ![]u8
fn dataCost(self: *Client, data: []const u8, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !UploadCostEstimate

// Chunks
fn chunkPut(self: *Client, data: []const u8) !PutResult
fn chunkGet(self: *Client, address: []const u8) ![]u8

// Files
fn filePut(self: *Client, path: []const u8, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !FilePutResult
fn fileGet(self: *Client, data_map: []const u8, dest_path: []const u8) !void
fn filePutPublic(self: *Client, path: []const u8, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !FilePutPublicResult
fn fileGetPublic(self: *Client, address: []const u8, dest_path: []const u8) !void
fn fileCost(self: *Client, path: []const u8, is_public: bool, payment_mode: PaymentMode) !UploadCostEstimate

// Wallet
fn walletAddress(self: *Client) !WalletAddress
fn walletBalance(self: *Client) !WalletBalance
fn walletApprove(self: *Client) !bool
```

---

## External Signer SDK Methods

Every SDK exposes a two-phase external-signer flow that lets the caller pay on-chain themselves (via wallet, hardware key, or custodial signer) instead of antd paying from its built-in wallet. The flow is always `prepare → external sign+pay → finalize`.

| SDK method | Prepares for | REST route | Wave-batch finalize | Merkle finalize |
|------------|--------------|------------|---------------------|-----------------|
| `prepare_data_upload(data, visibility?)` | private/public data put | `POST /v1/data/prepare` | `finalize_upload(id, tx_hashes)` | `finalize_merkle_upload(id, winner_pool_hash)` |
| `prepare_upload(path, visibility?)` | private file put | `POST /v1/upload/prepare` | `finalize_upload` | `finalize_merkle_upload` |
| `prepare_upload_public(path)` | public file put (DataMap stored on-network at finalize) | `POST /v1/upload/prepare` (visibility = "public") | `finalize_upload` | `finalize_merkle_upload` |
| `prepare_chunk_upload(data)` | single-chunk publish (no self-encryption) | `POST /v1/chunks/prepare` | `finalize_chunk_upload(id, tx_hashes)` | n/a — single chunks never trigger merkle |

Reference signatures (Python; same method names exist on every SDK with idiomatic casing — `prepareUpload` / `PrepareUpload` etc.):

```python
client.prepare_data_upload(data: bytes, visibility: str | None = None) → PrepareUploadResult
client.prepare_upload(path: str, visibility: str | None = None) → PrepareUploadResult
client.prepare_upload_public(path: str) → PrepareUploadResult
client.prepare_chunk_upload(data: bytes) → PrepareChunkResult
client.finalize_upload(upload_id: str, tx_hashes: dict[str, str]) → FinalizeUploadResult
client.finalize_merkle_upload(upload_id: str, winner_pool_hash: str, store_data_map: bool = False) → FinalizeUploadResult
client.finalize_chunk_upload(upload_id: str, tx_hashes: dict[str, str]) → str  # returns the chunk address
```

`PrepareUploadResult` and `PrepareChunkResult` both carry the `payment_type` discriminator the REST endpoints emit (`"wave_batch"` or `"merkle"`); SDKs surface it directly so the caller can branch on which finalize to call. For full payment-shape detail see the `/v1/data/prepare`, `/v1/upload/prepare`, and `/v1/chunks/prepare` REST entries above. `PrepareChunkResult` additionally exposes `already_stored: bool` for the no-payment-needed path.

All 15 SDKs expose these methods (REST-only SDKs included — they call the same endpoints).

---

## MCP Tool → SDK Method Mapping

Every tool with a `private` flag (`store_data`, `retrieve_data`, `upload_file`, `download_file`) picks the public method by default and switches to the private variant when `private=True`. The returned `address` carries either the on-network address (public) or the caller-held DataMap (private) — same field, different shape, so agents can round-trip the value back through the matching retrieve/download tool without renaming fields.

| MCP Tool | Python SDK Method | Description |
|----------|-------------------|-------------|
| `store_data(text, private?, payment_mode?)` | `data_put_public` / `data_put` | Store text on the network. Private store returns the caller-held DataMap in `address`. |
| `retrieve_data(address, private?)` | `data_get_public` / `data_get` | Retrieve text. Pass `private=True` if `address` is a caller-held DataMap from a private store. |
| `upload_file(path, private?, payment_mode?)` | `file_put_public` / `file_put` | Upload a local file. Private upload returns the caller-held DataMap in `address`. |
| `download_file(address, dest_path, private?)` | `file_get_public` / `file_get` | Download a file. Pass `private=True` if `address` is a caller-held DataMap from a private upload. |
| `chunk_put` | `chunk_put` | Store raw chunk |
| `chunk_get` | `chunk_get` | Retrieve raw chunk |
| `get_cost(text?, file_path?, payment_mode?)` | `data_cost` / `file_cost` | Estimate storage cost. `payment_mode` flows through so the quote matches the eventual put. |
| `check_balance` | `health` | Check daemon health |
| `wallet_address` | `wallet_address` | Get wallet public address |
| `wallet_balance` | `wallet_balance` | Get wallet balances |
| `wallet_approve` | `wallet_approve` | Approve wallet for payments |

---

## Error Codes

| HTTP | gRPC Status | JS/TS Error | Python Exception | C# Exception | Kotlin Exception | Swift Error | Java Exception | Rust Variant | C++ Error | Meaning |
|------|-------------|-------------|------------------|--------------|------------------|-------------|----------------|--------------|-----------|---------|
| 400 | INVALID_ARGUMENT | `BadRequestError` | `BadRequestError` | `BadRequestException` | `BadRequestException` | `BadRequestError` | `BadRequestException` | `AntdError::BadRequest` | `BadRequestError` | Malformed request |
| 402 | FAILED_PRECONDITION | `PaymentError` | `PaymentError` | `PaymentException` | `PaymentException` | `PaymentError` | `PaymentException` | `AntdError::Payment` | `PaymentError` | Insufficient wallet funds |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | `NotFoundError` | `NotFoundError` | `NotFoundException` | `NotFoundException` | `NotFoundError` | `NotFoundException` | `AntdError::NotFound` | `NotFoundError` | Address not found on network |
| 409 | ALREADY_EXISTS | `AlreadyExistsError` | `AlreadyExistsError` | `AlreadyExistsException` | `AlreadyExistsException` | `AlreadyExistsError` | `AlreadyExistsException` | `AntdError::AlreadyExists` | `AlreadyExistsError` | Resource already exists |
| 409 | ABORTED | `ForkError` | `ForkError` | `ForkException` | `ForkException` | `ForkError` | `ForkException` | `AntdError::Fork` | `ForkError` | Version conflict / fork |
| 413 | RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED | `TooLargeError` | `TooLargeError` | `TooLargeException` | `TooLargeException` | `TooLargeError` | `TooLargeException` | `AntdError::TooLarge` | `TooLargeError` | Data exceeds size limit |
| 500 | INTERNAL | `InternalError` | `InternalError` | `InternalException` | `InternalException` | `InternalError` | `InternalException` | `AntdError::Internal` | `InternalError` | Internal server error |
| 502 | UNAVAILABLE | `NetworkError` | `NetworkError` | `NetworkException` | `NetworkException` | `NetworkError` | `NetworkException` | `AntdError::Network` | `NetworkError` | Cannot reach network |
| 503 | UNAVAILABLE | `ServiceUnavailableError` | `ServiceUnavailableError` | `ServiceUnavailableException` | `ServiceUnavailableException` | `ServiceUnavailableError` | `ServiceUnavailableException` | `AntdError::ServiceUnavailable` | `ServiceUnavailableError` | Wallet not configured |

All exceptions inherit from `AntdError` (JS/TS, Python, Swift, Ruby, Lua, Zig, C++) / `AntdException` (C#, Kotlin, Java, PHP, Dart, Elixir uses `{:error, reason}` tuples). Rust uses `Result<T, AntdError>` with `match` on enum variants.

---

## Runnable Examples

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Python)

```python
from antd import AntdClient

client = AntdClient()
result = client.data_put_public(b"Hello, Autonomi!")
print(f"Stored at: {result.address}, cost: {result.cost}")

data = client.data_get_public(result.address)
print(f"Retrieved: {data.decode()}")
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Kotlin)

```kotlin
import com.autonomi.sdk.*
import kotlinx.coroutines.runBlocking

fun main() = runBlocking {
    val client = AntdClient.createRest()
    val result = client.dataPutPublic("Hello, Autonomi!".toByteArray())
    println("Stored at: ${result.address}, cost: ${result.cost}")

    val data = client.dataGetPublic(result.address)
    println("Retrieved: ${String(data)}")
    client.close()
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Swift)

```swift
import AntdSdk

let client = try AntdClient.createRest()
let result = try await client.dataPutPublic("Hello, Autonomi!".data(using: .utf8)!)
print("Stored at: \(result.address), cost: \(result.cost)")

let data = try await client.dataGetPublic(address: result.address)
print("Retrieved: \(String(data: data, encoding: .utf8)!)")
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Go)

```go
package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "log"

    antd "github.com/WithAutonomi/ant-sdk/antd-go"
)

func main() {
    client := antd.NewClient(antd.DefaultBaseURL)
    ctx := context.Background()

    result, err := client.DataPutPublic(ctx, []byte("Hello, Autonomi!"))
    if err != nil { log.Fatal(err) }
    fmt.Printf("Stored at: %s, cost: %s\n", result.Address, result.Cost)

    data, err := client.DataGetPublic(ctx, result.Address)
    if err != nil { log.Fatal(err) }
    fmt.Printf("Retrieved: %s\n", string(data))
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Java)

```java
import com.autonomi.antd.AntdClient;
import com.autonomi.antd.PutResult;

public class Main {
    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
        try (AntdClient client = AntdClient.create()) {
            PutResult result = client.dataPutPublic("Hello, Autonomi!".getBytes());
            System.out.printf("Stored at: %s, cost: %s%n", result.address(), result.cost());

            byte[] data = client.dataGetPublic(result.address());
            System.out.printf("Retrieved: %s%n", new String(data));
        }
    }
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Rust)

```rust
use antd_client::Client;

#[tokio::main]
async fn main() -> Result<(), antd_client::AntdError> {
    let client = Client::new("http://localhost:8082");

    let result = client.data_put_public(b"Hello, Autonomi!").await?;
    println!("Stored at: {}, cost: {}", result.address, result.cost);

    let data = client.data_get_public(&result.address).await?;
    println!("Retrieved: {}", String::from_utf8_lossy(&data));
    Ok(())
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (C++)

```cpp
#include <antd/antd.hpp>
#include <iostream>
#include <string>

int main() {
    try {
        antd::Client client;
        std::string payload = "Hello, Autonomi!";
        std::vector<uint8_t> data(payload.begin(), payload.end());

        auto result = client.dataPutPublic(data);
        std::cout << "Stored at: " << result.address << ", cost: " << result.cost << std::endl;

        auto retrieved = client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
        std::cout << "Retrieved: " << std::string(retrieved.begin(), retrieved.end()) << std::endl;
    } catch (const antd::AntdError& e) {
        std::cerr << "Error: " << e.what() << std::endl;
        return 1;
    }
    return 0;
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Ruby)

```ruby
require "antd"

client = Antd::Client.new
result = client.data_put_public("Hello, Autonomi!")
puts "Stored at: #{result.address}, cost: #{result.cost}"

data = client.data_get_public(result.address)
puts "Retrieved: #{data}"
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (PHP)

```php
<?php
use Autonomi\AntdClient;

$client = AntdClient::create();
$result = $client->dataPutPublic("Hello, Autonomi!");
echo "Stored at: {$result->address}, cost: {$result->cost}\n";

$data = $client->dataGetPublic($result->address);
echo "Retrieved: {$data}\n";
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Dart)

```dart
import 'package:antd/antd.dart';

void main() async {
  final client = AntdClient();
  final result = await client.dataPutPublic('Hello, Autonomi!'.codeUnits);
  print('Stored at: ${result.address}, cost: ${result.cost}');

  final data = await client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
  print('Retrieved: ${String.fromCharCodes(data)}');
}
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Lua)

```lua
local antd = require("antd")

local client = antd.Client.new()
local result = client:data_put_public("Hello, Autonomi!")
print("Stored at: " .. result.address .. ", cost: " .. result.cost)

local data = client:data_get_public(result.address)
print("Retrieved: " .. data)
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Elixir)

```elixir
client = Antd.Client.new()

{:ok, result} = Antd.Client.data_put_public(client, "Hello, Autonomi!")
IO.puts("Stored at: #{result.address}, cost: #{result.cost}")

{:ok, data} = Antd.Client.data_get_public(client, result.address)
IO.puts("Retrieved: #{data}")
```

### Store and Retrieve Public Data (Zig)

```zig
const std = @import("std");
const antd = @import("antd");

pub fn main() !void {
    var client = try antd.Client.init(.{});
    defer client.deinit();

    const result = try client.dataPutPublic("Hello, Autonomi!");
    std.debug.print("Stored at: {s}, cost: {s}\n", .{ result.address, result.cost });

    const data = try client.dataGetPublic(result.address);
    std.debug.print("Retrieved: {s}\n", .{data});
}
```

### Private Data Round-Trip (Python)

```python
from antd import AntdClient

client = AntdClient()

# Store private (encrypted) data
result = client.data_put_private(b"secret message")
print(f"Data map: {result.address}")

# Retrieve with data map
data = client.data_get_private(result.address)
print(f"Decrypted: {data.decode()}")
```
